top_findings.summary: This skill describes capabilities for "File System Access" (reading/writing files on the server), "OS Command Execution", and "Authentication Bypass" which extend far beyond the stated primary purpose of "SQL injection detection and exploitation for security testing." While authorized penetration testing may involve such activities, the skill's documentation normalizes highly invasive actions like writing web shells (`--file-write`) and executing OS commands (`--os-cmd`) as part of its core workflow without appropriate safeguards or explicit user confirmation for each escalated privilege action. This represents significant permission overreach beyond basic vulnerability detection.
